findings.description: The '読み進める前に' block is a framed advisory sidebar in the image. The JSON captures it as a term entry with the full advisory text. The zh/en reference 'reading the book' which lightly alludes to the source material, but this is a quotation of the original JP text and not a new disclosure of title/author.

reviewer_notes: Page covers the advisory sidebar before the Programming section, then introduces プログラミングとは (program/programming terms), 擬似言語 section/term, and the 'なぜ擬似言語なのか' detailed-explanation box. All 7 entities accurately represent their image counterparts. zh and en translations are faithful and natural. No high- or med-severity findings.
